agentDefinitions.name: article reviewer
agentDefinitions.description: Critically reviews outlines and article drafts for structure, style fit, fidelity, and publication readiness.

agentDefinitions.name: article writer
agentDefinitions.description: Builds a style-aware article package from brief through outline, draft, and revision handoff.

agentDefinitions.name: manga illustrator
agentDefinitions.description: Locks the visual language, creates character reference sheets, and generates video-frame imagery by default, with page/panel imagery only when explicitly requested.

agentDefinitions.name: manga showrunner
agentDefinitions.description: Creates the canonical story and character package for an original manga project and coordinates upstream creative direction.

agentDefinitions.name: storyboard director
agentDefinitions.description: Turns the approved manga canon package into a production-ready storyboard and continuity ledger.

agentDefinitions.name: voice and video producer
agentDefinitions.description: Adapts the approved manga visual package into speech assets, subtitles, and a motion-comic style final video.

agentDefinitions.name: narration-script-reviewer
agentDefinitions.description: Performs full review of narrated presentation scripts and slide storyboards for logic, support, redundancy, spoken clarity, and readiness for slide production.

agentDefinitions.name: presentation-director
agentDefinitions.description: Coordinates narrated presentation video projects and owns research, explanation structure, narration script, slide storyboard, and final explanation coherence.

agentDefinitions.name: slide-video-producer
agentDefinitions.description: Produces still-slide visuals, narration audio, subtitles when needed, and final simple narrated presentation video exports.

agentDefinitions.name: deck reviewer
agentDefinitions.description: Reviews image-only pitch/research deck slides for research fidelity, readability, prompt-output quality, and readiness before final deck assembly.

agentDefinitions.name: deep researcher
agentDefinitions.description: Performs deep research, writes the reasoning artifact, and prepares the evidence-backed handoff for deck planning.

agentDefinitions.name: infographic PowerPoint designer
agentDefinitions.description: Turns an evidence-backed research handoff into an infographic-style slide deck and images-only PowerPoint package.

agentDefinitions.name: api e2e engineer
agentDefinitions.description: Owns API, E2E, and broader executable validation work, including coverage design, environment setup, and evidence needed to prove real behavior across the actual system boundaries.

agentDefinitions.name: architecture reviewer
agentDefinitions.description: Reviews the design spec before implementation and checks spine inventory, ownership, naming, interface boundaries, decoupling, and migration safety.

agentDefinitions.name: code reviewer
agentDefinitions.description: Performs the engineering source review pass before API/E2E validation begins, and re-reviews repository-resident durable validation added during API/E2E.

agentDefinitions.name: delivery engineer
agentDefinitions.description: Owns post-validation docs sync, final handoff, repository finalization, release/publication preparation, deployment execution, and rollout verification.

agentDefinitions.name: implementation engineer
agentDefinitions.description: Executes the agreed design with a bias toward concrete delivery and clean change scope.

agentDefinitions.name: solution designer
agentDefinitions.description: Bootstraps task context, investigates requests, refines requirements, and produces the design spec for review before implementation.

agentDefinitions.name: promo-director
agentDefinitions.description: Coordinates software product promo video projects and owns product positioning, script, voiceover, measured timing, storyboard, CTA, and final message alignment.

agentDefinitions.name: promo-video-producer
agentDefinitions.description: Produces optional captions, audio-led segments, motion graphics, edit assembly, final export, and QA for software product promotional videos.

agentDefinitions.name: visual-director
agentDefinitions.description: Plans, generates, edits, polishes, and logs truthful promo visuals for software product promotional videos.

agentDefinitions.name: visual-reviewer
agentDefinitions.description: Reviews produced promo visuals for truthfulness, non-text callout/highlight accuracy, UI readability, no-added-text discipline, aspect ratio, sensitive data, and readiness before video assembly.

agentDefinitions.name: 细读经文的组员

agentDefinitions.name: 提供上下文的组员

agentDefinitions.name: 查经小组长
agentDefinitions.description: 以中文带领真实查经小组的多轮讨论，提出问题、推动深入，并在最后整理小组共识。
